source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
As shown in the figure below, six semicircles lie in the interior of a regular hexagon with side length $2$ so that the diameters of the semicircles coincide with the sides of the hexagon. What is the area of the shaded region—inside the hexagon but outside all of the semicircles?

<image1>

image_dependency: 题干以“As shown in the figure”开头，显式依赖图形。
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明文本本身不足以完整承载信息。
需要从图中确认 6 个半圆与正六边形边重合、阴影区域定义为空间关系问题。
multi_step: 求解通常至少包括：由边长 2 求正六边形面积，再求 6 个半圆总面积，最后做差。
需要组合多个几何对象的面积关系，而非单一步读取或直接代入。
答案为精确表达式 $3\sqrt{3}-\pi$，表明存在结构化几何推导过程。
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，标准答案是单一精确表达式，便于符号核验。
题目同时提供 choices 和 answer_text，可通过选项匹配与公式等价双重检查。

decision_reasons: asset_registry_record shows question, answer, and primary image are all present with no recorded issues
initial_scoring_record has high image_dependency, multi_step, and verifiability scores, indicating strong candidate value
the visual geometry dependency is supported by the existing image asset, so core semantics appear recoverable and complete
